commit_message: docs(closeout): reconcile cognition for cluster POL-470
evidence_summary: Worker POL-471 committed all primary documentation. Librarian reconciled specs/active/index.md to include quality-control-architecture, worker-router-architecture, and autoresearch-role-evidence-contract. All cross-references in QC docs validated as present.
notes: Worker POL-471 committed all primary documentation (quality-control-architecture.md, quality-control-lifecycle.md, POLARIS.md updates for src/finalize, src/autoresearch, src/cluster-state, src/loop, and SUMMARY.md files). Librarian reconciled specs/active/index.md to include quality-control-architecture, worker-router-architecture, and autoresearch-role-evidence-contract (three active specs that were missing from the index). All cross-references in QC docs validated as present. No raw docs related to POL-470 required promotion. src/qc/POLARIS.md write was prohibited (src/* in prohibited_write_paths).
